name: Prefrontal — Triage Ingest (poll a source → POST /triage)

meta.notes: TEMPLATE — configure before enabling. Polls a source of inbound signals and POSTs each to /triage, which classifies + routes it (dated event → commitment, task → augmented todo, outcome → episode, noise → logged drop) and fires triage.urgent on urgent items. Set TRIAGE_SOURCE_URL to your feed (a Gmail node's output, a Google Apps Script mail digest, an ICS/JSON endpoint), or replace the 'Fetch signals' node with your provider's node, and edit 'Map to Signal' to match its payload. Idempotent on (source, external_id), so a duplicate poll never double-creates a todo — map a stable provider id. Use a per-user token so routing lands in that user's data.
